历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2505→2480→2236→2402→2572, fluctuating narrowly within the 2236–2572 range over the past five years. The 2025 baseline is about 2572, slightly shifting back by about 170 places compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province: 118 in 2021, 117 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 119 in 2024, 121 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 108, a reduction of about 10.7% from 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 20th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving PPT disparagement of other majors and the Academic Affairs Office's response to cheating incidents, but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 66/106, rated as 'average'. No significant enrollment gaps recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 20 disciplines are rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Architecture A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, etc., highly matching the various enrollment categories of the Engineering Experimental Class.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Tianjin University continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province is about 80,000, roughly the same as 80,400 in 2025, with no significant increase in competition pressure. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Jilin Province. In 2025, its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%, with no significant regional preference or local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 10.7% easing competition, the roughly stable number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province, the top-tier university level with numerous advantageous disciplines, and stable application enthusiasm; the slightly negative reputation has limited impact. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2572, taking into account the competition relief from enrollment reduction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2376, with a range of 2105–2647.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2105–2647, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2105), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Future Technology College and New Engineering Innovation Center. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2647), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
